title: 1.1: Tests that placeholder rendering creates image references when using 8-bit color mode for image ID encoding
1.2: Tests that placeholder rendering creates image references when using 24-bit color mode for image ID encoding
1.3: Tests that contiguous placeholder characters combine into single image references
1.4: Tests that position diacritics correctly encode row and column positions for placeholders
1.5: Tests that a third combining character extends the image ID range beyond basic encoding
1.6: Tests extended ID support in both 8-bit and 24-bit color modes
1.7: Tests that non-existent image IDs result in zero references
1.8: Tests that multiple placements of the same image can be rendered simultaneously
1.9: Tests that different placement configurations can be distinguished and selected when rendering
1.10: Tests that placeholder images inside scroll margins move when scrolling
1.11: Tests that placeholder images outside scroll margins remain fixed when scrolling
1.12: Tests that placeholder images are removed when scrolled out of the margin region
2.1: Places the test for basic placeholder rendering in the graphics test file or directory
2.2: Places the test for extended ID support in the graphics test file or directory
2.3: Places the test for multiple placements in the graphics test file or directory
2.4: Places the test for scroll region behavior in the graphics test file or directory
3.1: All tests use Python unittest framework with test methods inside a TestCase class
3.2: All tests follow the test_<descriptive_name> naming pattern
3.3: All tests use equality assertion methods for comparing expected and actual values
3.4: All tests use put_helpers() function for test setup
3.5: All tests call update_only_line_graphics_data() before retrieving references
4.1: Uses put_image with unicode_placeholder=1 parameter for placeholder rendering test
4.2: Uses apply_sgr with foreground color codes to encode image IDs for placeholder tests
4.3: Uses the unicode placeholder character U+10EEEE for drawing placeholders
